required_protocol_sentence: DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
assignment: Progression work. Complete the already-public ObservationProjection contract without arbitrary tag enumeration. Add a namespaced string tag that inbound adapters can set for channel identity; declare it as an optional session.run dependency and include it in the safe projection. Declare the current projection as an optional agent.turn dependency; when a selected tool executes, override only the safe projection tag for that child execution with the selected tool name. Do not pass ctx or scope, expose prompts/tool inputs/memory/credentials/backend handles, add MCP, or add implicit lookup. Test channel propagation, tool-only child refinement, sibling isolation, and the absence of widened data. Keep the tag/flow/resource graph explicit and use the existing scope seam.

budget_and_stop_rule.stop: Stop when focused SDK tests and typecheck pass and the projection contains only its declared safe fields. Do not commit or update the PR.

output_schema: Changed paths, exact projection before/inside/after tool, focused tests, typecheck, and active-wall reads. Progression evidence is not acceptance.
